let a := x / (x - 1)
  let b := y / (y - 1)
  let c := z / (z - 1)
  have h_abc : (a - 1) * (b - 1) * (c - 1) = a * b * c := by
    simp [a, b, c]; field_simp [h₀.1, h₀.2.1, h₀.2.2]; rw [h₁, mul_one]
  have h_sq : a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 + c ^ 2 = (a + b + c - 1) ^ 2 + 1 := by
    calc a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 + c ^ 2
      = (a + b + c - 1) ^ 2 + 1 + 2 * (a * b + b * c + c * a - (a + b + c - 1)) := by ring
      _ = (a + b + c - 1) ^ 2 + 1 + 2 * (a * b * c - (a - 1) * (b - 1) * (c - 1)) := by ring
      _ = (a + b + c - 1) ^ 2 + 1 := by rw [h_abc, sub_self, mul_zero, add_zero]
  rw [show x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 + y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 + z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2 = a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 + c ^ 2 by simp [a, b, c, div_pow]]
  rw [h_sq]
  linarith [pow_two_nonneg (a + b + c - 1)]

  have h_abc : a * b * c = (a - 1) * (b - 1) * (c - 1) := by
    unfold a b c; field_simp [hx, hy, hz]; rw [h₁]
  have h_sum : a * b + b * c + c * a = a + b + c - 1 := by
    nlinarith [h_abc, show (a - 1) * (b - 1) * (c - 1) = a * b * c - (a * b + b * c + c * a) + a + b + c - 1 by ring]
  calc x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 + y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 + z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2
    _ = a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 + c ^ 2 := by simp [a, b, c, div_pow]
    _ = (a + b + c - 1) ^ 2 + 1 := by nlinarith [h_sum]
    _ ≥ 1 := by nlinarith
